title: dendrocoryne speciosa var. hillii
intro: Dendrocoryne speciosa var. hillii, also known as Hill's dendrocoryne or Hill's coral tree, is a variety of flowering plant in the family Clusiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. Dendrocoryne speciosa var. hillii can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
